description_long: This object is a rectangular, hardcover book with a predominantly white cover and a large, horizontal yellow-orange block on the front. The cover features a clean, modern design with minimalistic elements and some small text blocks, likely indicating the title and other information. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with visible page edges along the sides. The spine is white with a yellow-orange section and contains printed text, as well as a small logo near the bottom. The corners and edges are sharp and well-defined, suggesting a new or well-preserved condition. The overall appearance is professional and academic, suitable for use in educational or professional urban environments.
description: A rectangular, hardcover book with a white cover and a prominent yellow-orange block, featuring minimalistic design and visible spine text.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the white cover, yellow-orange block, and spine text with a small logo.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the front, displaying the full cover design with the yellow-orange block and most of the printed text.
description_view_2: The book is shown from the opposite side, highlighting the page edges and the clean, white back cover.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the back, showing the white cover and the edge of the yellow-orange block, with minimal visible text.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is white with a horizontal yellow-orange section and printed text in a clean, modern font. A small logo is present near the bottom of the spine.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small circular logo is visible on the lower right of the front cover and near the bottom of the spine, featuring a simple, abstract design.
